market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Cozy 4‑Guest Home – Great Value for NE
Modern Entire Home – Sleeps 4, Perfect Location
Comfortable NE Retreat – 4 Guests, Easy Access
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your private, entire home in the heart of the North‑East. This comfortable space is designed for up to four guests, making it ideal for families, small groups, or business travellers seeking a quiet base. The open‑plan living area offers a warm setting for relaxing after a day of exploring, and the well‑appointed bedroom provides a restful night’s sleep. A fully equipped kitchen lets you prepare meals at your own pace, while the dining nook is perfect for sharing breakfast or dinner together. 

Located in a convenient NE neighbourhood, you’ll be close to local shops, transport links and popular attractions, giving you easy access to everything the city has to offer. The property has earned a solid 4.46 rating from 35 guest reviews, reflecting consistent satisfaction with cleanliness, accuracy and host communication. 

Your host, Mina, is a new but attentive host who is dedicated to ensuring a smooth stay. At £228 per night, this listing sits at a premium compared with the city’s median rate of £175, so you can expect a higher‑end experience. Book now to enjoy a peaceful, fully private home that balances comfort, location and quality for a memorable NE stay.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, high‑resolution shot of the main living area as the cover photo – it showcases the full‑home feel and immediately signals space for up to four guests.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate of £228 is about 30% higher than the market median (£175) while occupancy (28.3%) matches the cohort median, indicating price is suppressing bookings; consider a rate reduction of ~15‑20% to improve fill‑rate.
No amenities are listed, missing high‑value categories like outdoor space, parking and entertainment that attract higher‑spending guests; add these to the listing to boost appeal.
The title "Humble Home NE 2" provides no differentiator; rewrite it to highlight capacity, value and location to capture search attention.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your current 28.3% occupancy at a £228 nightly rate is 30% above the market median, suggesting pricing is the primary barrier to more bookings.
